item.title: Nebius' Q4 Earnings Miss Doesn't Change Its Growth Narrative
item.description: Nebius is rapidly expanding its data center footprint to meet robust demand, and growth is forecast to exceed 500% this year.

item.title: Palantir Is Down 27%, But the Long-Term Math Still Favors Bulls
item.description: Palantir has captured only a small slice of its massive TAM. Strong margins and AI-driven demand suggest long-term growth despite recent PLTR stock vo...

item.title: Why Verizon, AT&T, and T-Mobile Are Beating the Market in 2026
item.description: U.S. telecom giants have been big winners early on in 2026, with Verizon Communications leading the way as its new CEO engineers a comeback story.

item.title: Generac Stock Rallies: Why AI Matters More Than Earnings
item.description: Generac shares rose to new highs as investors focused on the company's strategic role in powering the artificial intelligence and data center sectors.

item.title: Cisco Systems Below $82? Buy Now, It Won’t Last—$182 Is Coming
item.description: Cisco Systems is on track to double in price and could rise by a modest triple-digit amount in time, tracking with other DotCom-era names driven by AI...
